name: Loring Console Table White - Threshold™
description:
Add some contemporary charm to your entertainment space with this Loring Console Table from Threshold™. This media and storage stand features an elegant clean-lined silhouette. It has a white rectangular tabletop with two drawers below, paired with a contrast-color metal frame with sleek legs and a bottom rack with complementing metal slats. The pristine white surface invites decor accents, drawers offer concealed storage and the bottom rack provides additional display space.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
